query: SELECT id, contactName, contactPhone, callDate, status, classification, classificationReason, source, duration, teamMemberId, ghlConversationId FROM calls WHERE contactName LIKE '%Balboa%' OR contactName LIKE '%Tara%' OR contactName LIKE '%Josh%' OR contactName LIKE '%Anna%' OR contactName LIKE '%Salyer%' ORDER BY callDate DESC LIMIT 20
